programs.title: Fireworks Cruises
programs.description: Charter a private watercraft and set sail on a relaxing specialty cruise from one of the Walt Disney World marinas to enjoy a stunning fireworks show.

price.notes: Prices start at $499, plus tax, and vary by date. Boats seat up to 10 Guests.

description.text: Charter a private watercraft and set sail on a relaxing specialty cruise from one of the Walt Disney World marinas to enjoy a stunning fireworks show.

availability.text: Reservations

Make a reservation up to 60 days prior to your visit for Happily Ever After or Luminous The Symphony of Us. You may also reserve via the My Disney Experience app or by calling (407) WDW-PLAY or (407) 939-7529. Guests younger than 18 years of age must have parent or guardian permission to call. No bookings are accepted after noon of the day prior to the cruise to be reserved. Inquiries regarding availability made within the booking cut-off window may only be done at the location.

In rare instances, fireworks shows may be rescheduled or cancelled. Please refer to the entertainment schedule or My Disney Experience app to reconfirm the fireworks showtimes 2 weeks prior to your reservation and again on the day of your reservation. Fireworks are subject to change and not guaranteed.
Reservations are nontransferable and may not be sold or bartered.
There is a 24-hour cancellation policy. Full price will be charged/forfeited if the Guest cancels within 24 hours or fails to show up for the reservation.

description.text: Mosey on over for trail, pony, wagon, and carriage rides amid the rustic beauty of Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort.

availability.text: The stable near the Settlement area of Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort & Campground is open from 10:00 AM to 5:00 PM daily. Guests are welcome to walk through the area and visit the horses. Pony rides also depart from this location.

programs.title: Volleyball
programs.description: Bump, set and spike your way to fun at any of 8 sand courts found at Walt Disney World Resort hotels.

price.notes: Any Guest of a Walt Disney World Resort hotel may access the volleyball courts, and equipment can be obtained using a valid Resort ID. Disney Vacation Club members may check out equipment free of charge; for all other Guests, an associated fee applies.

offerings.title: Fort Wilderness Archery Experience
offerings.description: Guests 7 years of age and older can test out their skills—and experience the thrill—of archery during this 75 minute session.

location.label: Bike Barn

price.notes: $49 per Person (tax not included)

resort_join.text: At the Bike Barn at Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort, Archery Guides teach Guests 7 years of age and up how to use a compound bow; then it's time for target practice! Most of this 75-minute experience is dedicated to firing at range targets. With class sizes limited to 10 Guests, each marksman receives personalized advice from the Archery Guides to best help you hone your archery skills.
Guests who plan on driving may park at the entrance to Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort and take the Yellow or Orange Line buses to Bike Barn.

description.text: Guests 7 years of age and older can test out their skills—and experience the thrill—of archery during this 75 minute session.

offerings.title: Pony Rides
offerings.description: Introduce your junior cowboy or cowgirl to our 4-legged equine friends with an old-fashioned pony ride.

location.label: the stable near Pioneer Hall

price.notes: $10 per Child (Ages 3–9) (tax not included)

resort_join.text: LocatedinThe Campsites at Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort

Pony rides are offered daily at Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort & Campground with the last ride of the day 30 minutes prior to close. Riders must be at least 3 years of age, under 80 pounds, no taller than 48 inches and able to hang on by themselves. A parent or guardian must lead the pony at all times.

description.text: Introduce your junior cowboy or cowgirl to our 4-legged equine friends with an old-fashioned pony ride.

location.text: Pony Rides are available at the stable near Pioneer Hall on a walk-in basis only.

price.text: $10 per Child (Ages 3–9) (tax not included)

booking.text: A fee is associated with this activity. No reservations are necessary.

offerings.title: Horse Drawn Excursion - Wagon Ride
offerings.description: Wagon Rides at Fort Wilderness Resort

location.label: Pioneer Hall

availability.label: Schedule varies; confirm operating days and times

price.notes: Wagon rides depart Friday, Saturday and Sunday evenings at 6:00 PM and 8:30 PM (weather permitting) from the front of Pioneer Hall. These 25-minute rides cost $15 for Guests ages 10 and up, and $10 for Guests 3 to 9 years of age. This is a group wagon ride and tickets are sold by the driver 20 minutes prior to the departure time. Cash and MagicBands are accepted as forms of payment.

resort_join.text: LocatedinThe Campsites at Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort
Giddy up for an old-fashioned, horse-drawn wagon ride at The Cabins and Campsites of Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort.
The ride departs across from Pioneer Hall at Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort & Campground.
If arriving by your own vehicle, please park in the main entrance of Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort & Campground and take a complimentary bus ride to the Settlement Depot.

description.text: Wagon Rides at Fort Wilderness Resort | Walt Disney World Resort

availability.text: Wagon rides depart Friday, Saturday and Sunday evenings at 6:00 PM and 8:30 PM (weather permitting) from the front of Pioneer Hall. These 25-minute rides cost $15 for Guests ages 10 and up, and $10 for Guests 3 to 9 years of age. This is a group wagon ride and tickets are sold by the driver 20 minutes prior to the departure time. Cash and MagicBands are accepted as forms of payment.
Rides are only available on Friday, Saturday and Sunday evenings, and available on a first-come, first-served basis. Reservations are not accepted.

location.label: Disney's Contemporary Resort

price.notes: Guests who need to cancel cabana reservations must provide 24-hour notice. The full price of your reservation will be charged in the event of no-shows or same-day cancellations.

amenities: Padded furniture, including chairs and couch
Ceiling fan
Bluetooth® speaker
Television with cable service
Phone for internal Resort calls
Fruit tray
Mini refrigerator stocked with complimentary sodas and water
Safe

resort_join.text: Cabanas are available for full day rentals. Cabanas at Disney's Contemporary Resort and Disney's Grand Floridian Resort & Spa—as well as those shared by Disney’s Beach Club Resort and Disney’s Yacht Club Resort—are available to Guests of those Resorts only.
Disney’s Yacht Club Resort and Beach Club Resort
Cabanas at Disney's Contemporary Resort and Disney's Grand Floridian Resort & Spa can only be booked by Guests of each Resort hotel.
Cabanas shared by Disney’s Beach Club Resort and Disney’s Yacht Club Resort can only be booked by Guests of either Resort hotel.

offerings.title: Fireworks Cruises
offerings.description: Charter a private watercraft and set sail on a relaxing specialty cruise from one of the Walt Disney World marinas to enjoy a stunning fireworks show.

location.label: Boat Nook Marina

price.notes: Prices start at $499, plus tax, and vary by date. Boats seat up to 10 Guests.

resort_join.text: Sail from the Boat Nook Marina at Disney’s Contemporary Resort to view Happily Ever After. Additional pickup locations may be available within the Magic Kingdom area by visiting your Resort concierge or calling (407) WDW-PLAY or (407) 939-7529 after booking your cruise. Guests younger than 18 years of age must have parent or guardian permission to call.
Depart on your cruise from the Bayside Marina at Disney’s Yacht & Beach Club Resorts.

description.text: Charter a private watercraft and set sail on a relaxing specialty cruise from one of the Walt Disney World marinas to enjoy a stunning fireworks show.

availability.text: Reservations

Make a reservation up to 60 days prior to your visit for Happily Ever After or Luminous The Symphony of Us. You may also reserve via the My Disney Experience app or by calling (407) WDW-PLAY or (407) 939-7529. Guests younger than 18 years of age must have parent or guardian permission to call. No bookings are accepted after noon of the day prior to the cruise to be reserved. Inquiries regarding availability made within the booking cut-off window may only be done at the location.

In rare instances, fireworks shows may be rescheduled or cancelled. Please refer to the entertainment schedule or My Disney Experience app to reconfirm the fireworks showtimes 2 weeks prior to your reservation and again on the day of your reservation. Fireworks are subject to change and not guaranteed.
Reservations are nontransferable and may not be sold or bartered.
There is a 24-hour cancellation policy. Full price will be charged/forfeited if the Guest cancels within 24 hours or fails to show up for the reservation.
Check available cruise days.

Make a reservation up to 60 days prior to your visit for Happily Ever After or Luminous The Symphony of Us. You may also reserve via the My Disney Experience app or by calling (407) WDW-PLAY or (407) 939-7529. Guests younger than 18 years of age must have parent or guardian permission to call. No bookings are accepted after noon of the day prior to the cruise to be reserved. Inquiries regarding availability made within the booking cut-off window may only be done at the location.

In rare instances, fireworks shows may be rescheduled or cancelled. Please refer to the entertainment schedule or My Disney Experience app to reconfirm the fireworks showtimes 2 weeks prior to your reservation and again on the day of your reservation. Fireworks are subject to change and not guaranteed.
Reservations are nontransferable and may not be sold or bartered.
There is a 24-hour cancellation policy. Full price will be charged/forfeited if the Guest cancels within 24 hours or fails to show up for the reservation.

offerings.title: Horse-Drawn Carriage Rides at Fort Wilderness Resort
offerings.description: Relax on a horse-drawn carriage ride along the scenic trails around The Cabins and Campsites of Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort.

location.label: Crockett’s Tavern

availability.label: 5:30 PM, 6:00 PM, 6:30 PM; available days vary

price.notes: $65 (tax not included)

title.text: Horse-Drawn Carriage Rides at Fort Wilderness Resort | Walt Disney World Resort

resort_join.text: Horse-Drawn Carriage Rides at Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort & Campground
Relax on a horse-drawn carriage ride along the scenic trails around The Cabins and Campsites of Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort.
Enjoy the beauty of nature as you travel in style around Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort & Campground.

You’ll board your horse-drawn carriage for a 25-minute ride near Crockett’s Tavern. If arriving by vehicle, please park in the main entrance of Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort & Campground and take a bus to the Settlement Depot. Carriages fit up to 4 adults, or 2 adults and 3 small children.
Please check in across from the main entrance to Crockett’s Tavern near Pioneer Hall at Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort & Campground 15 minutes prior to your reservation.
If arriving by your own vehicle, please park in the main entrance of Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort and Campground and take a complimentary bus ride to the Settlement Depot.

offerings.title: Horseback Riding
offerings.description: Horseback Trail Riding at Fort Wilderness Resort

location.label: Tri-Circle-D Ranch building

availability.label: 8:00 AM, 9:30 AM, 11:00 AM; available days vary

price.notes: $65 per Person (tax not included)

resort_join.text: Go horseback riding on the scenic, wooded trails at The Cabins and Campsites of Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort. Guests must be 9 years of age or older and at least 48 inches (122 cm) tall to participate.

Guests 9 years of age and up can ride through an idyllic woodland teeming with deer, ducks, armadillos and rabbits. This trail ride is perfect for beginner and intermediate riders. Horses will keep a steady walking pace as we explore the natural beauty surrounding Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort & Campgrounds.
Please check in at the Tri-Circle-D Ranch building, located near the front parking lot of Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort & Campground at your reserved time.
Please check in at the Tri-Circle-D Ranch building near the front parking lot of Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort & Campground at the reservation time.

offerings.description: A fitness facility at Disney’s Old Key West Resort, featuring state-of-the-art strength training equipment.

location.label: A fitness facility at Disney’s Old Key West Resort, featuring state-of-the-art strength training equipment.

price.notes: Old Key West Exercise Room is complimentary for Guests staying at Disney’s Old Key West Resort.

resort_join.text: A fitness facility at Disney’s Old Key West Resort, featuring state-of-the-art strength training equipment.

Stay fit while at Walt Disney World Resort with high-tech fitness machines to keep you going strong. Life Fitness treadmills, bicycles (regular and recumbent), ellipticals and stair climbers are available to Guests of Disney’s Old Key West Resort seeking cardiovascular exercise. Free weights and weight machines are also on site for those looking to pump iron while on vacation.
Old Key West Exercise Room is complimentary for Guests staying at Disney’s Old Key West Resort.

description.text: A fitness facility at Disney’s Old Key West Resort, featuring state-of-the-art strength training equipment.

availability.text: 6:00 AMto9:00 PM
Old Key West Exercise Room is open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. You will be required to use your MagicBand.

location.text: A fitness facility at Disney’s Old Key West Resort, featuring state-of-the-art strength training equipment.

price.text: Old Key West Exercise Room is complimentary for Guests staying at Disney’s Old Key West Resort.

booking.text: Call for Reservations : (407) WDW-PLAY

Oasis Patios accommodate up to 6 Guests and are available for rent on a first-come, first-served basis to Guests of Disney’s Polynesian Resort only. For advance reservations and pricing information, call (407) WDW-PLAY [(407) 939-7529]. Guests under 18 years of age must have parent or guardian permission to call.
Advance reservations are highly recommended as patios book quickly.
Guests who need to cancel patio reservations must provide 24-hour notice. The full price of your reservation will be charged in the event of no-shows or same-day cancellations.

title.text: Pools at Disney's All-Star Movies Resort | Walt Disney World Resort

description.text: Be immersed in Disney storytelling as you make a splash at the Fantasia Pool and the Duck Pond Pool.

availability.text: Hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.

location.text: Fantasia Pool
Inspired by the Disney classic Fantasia, this sprawling pool is home to a Sorcerer Mickey fountain. For the little ones, a smaller kiddie pool and water play area are located nearby.
The Fantasia Pool is located between the Fantasia building and Cinema Hall.
Duck Pond Pool

Go for a “splash-shot” at this pool based on The Mighty Ducks film series. Designed to resemble a hockey rink, this 105,438-gallon pool is the perfect place for families to relax and unwind before or after a visit to the parks.

Duck Pond Pool

Go for a “splash-shot” at this pool based on The Mighty Ducks film series. Designed to resemble a hockey rink, this 105,438-gallon pool is the perfect place for families to relax and unwind before or after a visit to the parks.
Poolside Activities

Let’s make a splash at Fantasia Pool! Join us for family-friendly activities each day, like themed pool parties and other cool activities. Fun offerings include themed pool games, relays, trivia and more! See a Recreation Host for additional details.
Complimentary towels are provided at all pools.

location.text: Calypso Pool

Go for a dip at the Calypso Pool, home to a colorful fountain of the Three Caballeros. Featuring Donald Duck, José Carioca and Panchito in the center of the 251,418-gallon, guitar-shaped pool, the fountain lightheartedly shoots water at nearby swimmers. Bongos and maracas line the pool area and add to the charming musical theme.
For little ones, a kiddie pool is located nearby behind Melody Hall.
Movies Under the Stars
For even more fun, Disney movies are screened on select nights at the Calypso Pool.

title.text: Pools at Disney's All-Star Sports Resort | Walt Disney World Resort

resort_join.text: Pools at Disney's All-Star Sports Resort | Walt Disney World Resort
Pools at Disney's All-Star Sports Resort

From January 2026 until late April 2026, the Surfboard Bay Pool and the kiddie pool at Disney’s All-Star Sports Resort will be closed for maintenance. During this time, the Grand Slam Leisure Pool at Disney’s All-Star Sports will continue to be available. Additionally, Guests are welcome to use the other pools throughout Disney’s All-Star Resorts, including the Calypso Pool, Piano Pool and kiddie pool at Disney’s All-Star Music Resort; and the Fantasia Pool, Duck Pond Pool and kiddie pool at Disney’s All-Star Movies Resort.

location.text: Surfboard Bay Pool

Surf’s up at this 242,471-gallon swimming hole designed to make you feel like you’re at the beach. Featuring giant, 3-story surfboards lining the pool area, it’s the perfect place to catch some rays and cool off.
For little ones, a kiddie pool is located behind Stadium Hall adjacent to Surfboard Bay Pool.
Grand Slam Pool

Shaped like a baseball diamond, this pool features Goofy on a pitcher’s mound lobbing a stream of water at swimmers. Continuing the sporty theme, the sundeck is designed like an outfield and huge 3-story baseball bats line the pool area.

title.text: Pools at Disney's Animal Kingdom Lodge | Walt Disney World Resort

resort_join.text: Pools at Disney's Animal Kingdom Lodge | Walt Disney World Resort
Pools at Disney's Animal Kingdom Lodge
LocatedinDisney's Animal Kingdom LodgeatDisney's Animal Kingdom Resort Area

description.text: Cool off amid African-inspired architecture and a wildlife preserve at the Uzima Springs Pool and the Samawati Springs Pool

availability.text: Hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.

location.text: Uzima Springs Pool

Go for a dip in the enchanting Uzima Springs Pool, an 11,000-square-foot tropical oasis facing Uzima Savanna. Surrounded by large canopy trees and Floridian palms, the 234,980-gallon pool features a gently sloping, zero-depth entry point similar to that of a natural beach, along with a 67-foot-long waterslide.
Nearby, a lounge and bar offer refreshments and snacks.
Samawati Springs Pool

Make a splash at the Samawati Springs Pool—located just a short walk away at Disney’s Animal Kingdom Villas – Kidani! Featuring an exciting 128-foot waterslide and zero-depth-entry, this 4,700-square-foot, 118,138-gallon pool is the perfect place to cool off and have fun.

price.text: Pools at Disney's Animal Kingdom Lodge | Walt Disney World Resort
Pools at Disney's Animal Kingdom Lodge

amenities.text: Uzima Springs Pool

Go for a dip in the enchanting Uzima Springs Pool, an 11,000-square-foot tropical oasis facing Uzima Savanna. Surrounded by large canopy trees and Floridian palms, the 234,980-gallon pool features a gently sloping, zero-depth entry point similar to that of a natural beach, along with a 67-foot-long waterslide.
Nearby, a lounge and bar offer refreshments and snacks.
Samawati Springs Pool

Make a splash at the Samawati Springs Pool—located just a short walk away at Disney’s Animal Kingdom Villas – Kidani! Featuring an exciting 128-foot waterslide and zero-depth-entry, this 4,700-square-foot, 118,138-gallon pool is the perfect place to cool off and have fun.
Nearby, a lounge and bar offer refreshments and snacks.
Uwanja Camp

The pool area also includes Uwanja Camp, a water playground with 3 distinct zones to please kids of all ages. At Observation Station, children 4 years of age and younger can climb through cargo crates, unscramble animal images and frolic through a gently bubbling geyser and shallow cistern pool—while their parents watch from nearby.
At Departure Zone, a leaky water tower and sneaky African irises squirt children 5 to 7 years of age, while at Base Camp, kids 8 years of age and up can douse each other with water cannons.
Poolside Activities

Let’s make a splash at Uzima Springs and Samawati Springs Pools! Join us for family-friendly activities each day, like themed pool parties and other cool activities. Fun offerings include themed pool games, relays, trivia and more! See a Recreation Host for additional details.
Complimentary towels are provided at all pools.

description.text: Take the plunge in 3 pools including The Big Blue Pool, the single largest hotel pool at Walt Disney World Resort.

availability.text: Pool lifts and other access options are available for guests with disabilities or limited mobility. Pool hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.
Pool lifts and other access options are available for guests with disabilities or limited mobility. Pool hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.

location.text: The Big Blue Pool
Just keep swimming in the largest hotel pool in all of Walt Disney World Resort.

Inspired by the Disney•Pixar “splash hit” Finding Nemo, this huge, zero-entry pool contains over 308,527 gallons! Guests can relive the story of their favorite clown fish alongside giant set pieces of Nemo, Crush and other beloved characters from the film.

For the little ones, Schoolyard Sprayground is home to pop-up jets, gushing water and more familiar faces from Finding Nemo, while Squirt’s Righteous Reef is a Nemo-themed playground perfect for kids who prefer to stay dry during playtime.
For refreshing snacks and beverages, drop by The Drop Off pool bar conveniently located nearby.

price.text: Pools at Disney's Art of Animation Resort | Walt Disney World Resort
Pools at Disney's Art of Animation Resort

amenities.text: The Big Blue Pool
Just keep swimming in the largest hotel pool in all of Walt Disney World Resort.

Inspired by the Disney•Pixar “splash hit” Finding Nemo, this huge, zero-entry pool contains over 308,527 gallons! Guests can relive the story of their favorite clown fish alongside giant set pieces of Nemo, Crush and other beloved characters from the film.

For the little ones, Schoolyard Sprayground is home to pop-up jets, gushing water and more familiar faces from Finding Nemo, while Squirt’s Righteous Reef is a Nemo-themed playground perfect for kids who prefer to stay dry during playtime.
For refreshing snacks and beverages, drop by The Drop Off pool bar conveniently located nearby.
Cozy Cone Pool
Check in and chill in cone-shaped cabanas around the Cozy Cone Motel swimming pool! Inspired by the Disney•Pixar mega-hit Cars, the this is the perfect place for families looking to cool their jets.

Surrounded by life-sized models of beloved Cars characters—Doc, Sally, Mater, McQueen and more—your crew can make a splash in this kid-friendly 74,740-gallon watering hole, while you blissfully “idle” in the shade of our unique, orange-cone cabanas. Ka-chow!
Pool lifts and other access options are available for guests with disabilities or limited mobility. Pool hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.
Flippin’ Fins Pool

Make a splash in the Flippin' Fins Pool—or let your cares drift away as you lounge poolside. Based on the Disney animated classic The Little Mermaid, this 103,642-gallon pool features the “Under the Sea Orchestra” conducted by Sebastian and whimsical set pieces based on popular characters from the film.
Pool lifts and other access options are available for guests with disabilities or limited mobility. Pool hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.
Poolside Activities

Let’s make a splash at The Big Blue Pool! Join us for family-friendly activities each day, like themed pool parties and other cool activities. Fun offerings include themed pool games, relays, trivia and more! See a Recreation Host for additional details.
Complimentary towels are provided at all pools.

The Main Pool

Breeze down the 17-foot-high, 131-foot-long curving waterslide and take in views of the marina, or simply relax and rejuvenate in one of 2 whirlpool spas. Little ones will surely love to splash it up in the water play area.
Bay Lake Pool

Go for a gentle swim in the Bay Lake Pool—a round, leisure pool which is shallow on the outside and deeper in the center. Poolside cabanas are also available to rent on a daily basis. It’s the perfect place to unwind after a busy day at the parks.

title.text: Pools at Disney's Beach Club Resort | Walt Disney World Resort

resort_join.text: Pools at Disney's Beach Club Resort | Walt Disney World Resort
Pools at Disney's Beach Club Resort
LocatedinDisney's Beach Club ResortatEPCOT Resort Area

Disney's Beach Club Resort pool—the 43,000-gallon Tidal pool—is located in a garden area on the far end of the resort facing Crescent Lake. Disney's Yacht Club Resort pool—the 54,000-gallon Admiral pool—can be found in its own quiet garden area. A third pool—the 55,350-gallon Dunes Cove pool—is privately located at Disney’s Beach Club Villas. Though it is situated for the convenience of Guests staying at the Disney Beach Club Villas, all Resort Guests are welcome to enjoy it. All pools also include steaming whirlpool spas.

location.text: 3 Leisure Pools
Guests seeking a tranquil swim can choose from 3 leisure pools in Disney's Beach and Yacht Club Resorts.

Disney's Beach Club Resort pool—the 43,000-gallon Tidal pool—is located in a garden area on the far end of the resort facing Crescent Lake. Disney's Yacht Club Resort pool—the 54,000-gallon Admiral pool—can be found in its own quiet garden area. A third pool—the 55,350-gallon Dunes Cove pool—is privately located at Disney’s Beach Club Villas. Though it is situated for the convenience of Guests staying at the Disney Beach Club Villas, all Resort Guests are welcome to enjoy it. All pools also include steaming whirlpool spas.
Poolside Activities

Let’s make a splash at Stormalong Bay! Join us for family-friendly activities each day, like themed pool parties and other cool activities. Fun offerings include themed pool games, relays, trivia and more! See a Recreation Host for additional details.

resort_join.text: From January 11, 2027, through April 2027, the Luna Park Pool, the Luna Park Crazy Play Area and Leaping Horse Libations at Disney’s BoardWalk Inn and Disney’s BoardWalk Villas will be closed for routine maintenance. Guests may see and hear work taking place during daytime hours. However, the Villas Pool and the Inn Pool will remain open for Guests to enjoy.

description.text: Relax at the Luna Park Pool plus 2 leisure pools amid the elegance of turn-of-the-century Atlantic City.

availability.text: Hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.

location.text: Luna Park Pool

Swim in this carnival-themed pool that is home to a 200-foot-long waterslide. Make a splash in a 184,217-gallon pool inspired by a 1920s amusement park. Adults can enjoy the serenity of the whirlpool spa while little ones will surely want to splash it up in the kiddie pool.
Plus, be sure to stop by the nearby Leaping Horse Libations for tasty sandwiches, refreshing beverages and so much more.
2 Leisure Pools

Guests seeking a tranquil swimming experience can choose from 2 leisure pools. One is located south of Luna Park Pool and the other is located on the east side of the Resort hotel. Both feature whirlpool spas for additional relaxation.

title.text: Pools at Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort | Walt Disney World Resort

resort_join.text: Pools at Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort | Walt Disney World Resort

description.text: Go wild amid a rustic American Frontier theme at the Meadow Swimmin’ Pool and the Wilderness Swimmin’ Pool.

availability.text: Hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change. Towels are not available at the pools, so please take your room towels with you when going for a swim.

location.text: Meadow Swimmin’ Pool

Make a splash at Meadow Swimmin’ Pool, the feature pool with a 67-foot-long corkscrew waterslide. Adults are invited to enjoy the serenity of whirlpool spa, while little ones will surely want to splash it up in the adjacent fort-themed water play area—where young buckaroos can breeze down on their own tot-friendly slides.
Nearby, a snack shop offer refreshments and snacks.
Wilderness Swimmin’ Pool
Retreat to Wilderness Swimmin’ Pool, the all-ages leisure pool with a whirlpool spa, for a more tranquil swim.

title.text: Pools at Disney's Caribbean Beach Resort | Walt Disney World Resort

resort_join.text: Pools at Disney's Caribbean Beach Resort | Walt Disney World Resort
Pools at Disney's Caribbean Beach Resort

description.text: Set out on a watery adventure at our feature pool—Fuentes del Morro Pool—or enjoy a serene swim at one of several unique leisure pools.

availability.text: Hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.

location.text: Fuentes del Morro Pool

Make a splash at this zero-entry pirate’s paradise, themed like a colonial Spanish fortress. Swashbuckling adventurers can zip by on one of 2 waterslides—including one measuring 102 feet long—and feel the spray of man-of-war-cannons. Little ones can cavort at the shipwreck play area, complete with mini slides, a crow’s nest and a barrel of laughs that dispenses a drenching downpour.
A 12-person spa pool provides relaxation after a long day on the high seas, as do tropical drinks from the nearby Banana Cabana pool bar.
Please note: Guests must be 48" or under to enjoy the Fuentes del Morro Water Play Area.
5 Leisure Pools

price.text: Pools at Disney's Caribbean Beach Resort | Walt Disney World Resort
Pools at Disney's Caribbean Beach Resort

amenities.text: Fuentes del Morro Pool

Make a splash at this zero-entry pirate’s paradise, themed like a colonial Spanish fortress. Swashbuckling adventurers can zip by on one of 2 waterslides—including one measuring 102 feet long—and feel the spray of man-of-war-cannons. Little ones can cavort at the shipwreck play area, complete with mini slides, a crow’s nest and a barrel of laughs that dispenses a drenching downpour.
A 12-person spa pool provides relaxation after a long day on the high seas, as do tropical drinks from the nearby Banana Cabana pool bar.

title.text: Pools at Disney's Coronado Springs Resort | Walt Disney World Resort

resort_join.text: Pools at Disney's Coronado Springs Resort | Walt Disney World Resort
Pools at Disney's Coronado Springs Resort

description.text: Unearth watery fun at the Dig Site—home to the Lost City of Cibola pool—or go for a serene swim in 3 leisure pools.

availability.text: Hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.

location.text: The Lost City of Cibola Pool

Sun worshipers of all ages will dig the Dig Site, a sprawling pool complex with a Mayan ruins theme. Discover the Lost City of Cibola pool, whose centerpiece is a 50-foot pyramid where weary explorers can revive themselves in the waters streaming down its stone steps. A 123-foot-long waterslide featuring a spitting Jaguar spirit animal makes for a fierce ride.

The Dig Site also boasts the largest hot tub on Walt Disney World Resort property, with room for 22 tribesmen. Seasonal poolside activities, Siesta’s pool bar, a white-sand volleyball court, the Iguana Arcade and a kiddie pool offer golden opportunities for fun.

Join us for family-friendly activities each day including “The Swimming of the Bulls” and themed pool parties celebrating Walt Disney World’s 50th Anniversary as well as the rich cultures of the Coronado Springs Resort. See a Recreation Host for additional details.
3 Leisure Pools

title.text: Pools at Disney's Grand Floridian Resort & Spa | Walt Disney World Resort

resort_join.text: Pools at Disney's Grand Floridian Resort & Spa | Walt Disney World Resort
Pools at Disney's Grand Floridian Resort & Spa

description.text: Soak, splash or slide in the crystal-clear Beach Pool or enjoy a more tranquil swim at the Courtyard Pool.

availability.text: Hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.

location.text: Beach Pool

Cool off in this 111,261-gallon pool overlooking Seven Seas Lagoon. Breeze down the 181-foot-long waterslide amid a serene natural springs-themed setting, complete with cascading waterfalls and zero-depth entry similar to that of a beach. A walking bridge provides a picturesque view of the pool for snapping pictures of family and friends gliding down the slide and an onsite lounge and bar offer refreshments and snacks.
Nearby, little ones will surely want to splash it up in the adjacent aquatic play area. For added luxury, cabanas are available for rent.
Courtyard Pool

Escape to a serene environment at this zero-entry leisure pool, conveniently located behind the main building. Offering a calm and peaceful swimming experience, the heated Courtyard Pool descends to a maximum depth of nearly 5 feet, and features an adjacent whirlpool spa.

price.text: Pools at Disney's Grand Floridian Resort & Spa | Walt Disney World Resort
Pools at Disney's Grand Floridian Resort & Spa

amenities.text: Beach Pool

Cool off in this 111,261-gallon pool overlooking Seven Seas Lagoon. Breeze down the 181-foot-long waterslide amid a serene natural springs-themed setting, complete with cascading waterfalls and zero-depth entry similar to that of a beach. A walking bridge provides a picturesque view of the pool for snapping pictures of family and friends gliding down the slide and an onsite lounge and bar offer refreshments and snacks.
Nearby, little ones will surely want to splash it up in the adjacent aquatic play area. For added luxury, cabanas are available for rent.
Courtyard Pool

Escape to a serene environment at this zero-entry leisure pool, conveniently located behind the main building. Offering a calm and peaceful swimming experience, the heated Courtyard Pool descends to a maximum depth of nearly 5 feet, and features an adjacent whirlpool spa.

Towels are available at the pool and lifejackets are available at The Captain’s Shipyard. Pools lifts and other access options can be arranged for Guests with disabilities or limited mobility. For assistance, please contact the Resort Front Desk or speak to a Cast Member.
Poolside Activities

Let’s make a splash at Beach Pool! Join us for family-friendly activities each day, like themed pool parties and other cool activities. Fun offerings include themed pool games, relays, trivia and more! See a Recreation Host for additional details.
Complimentary towels are provided at all pools.

availability.text: Hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.

location.text: Sandcastle Pool

Glide down a 125-foot-long waterslide through a giant sandcastle, and sunbathe on a sand beach. Decorative dolphins spout water at this 149,600-gallon feature pool that recalls the carefree romantic attitude of the Florida Keys. After your swim, relax in the whirlpool spa and feel your cares melt away in a dry sauna inside the pool deck’s lighthouse.
Located near Hospitality House, the Sandcastle Pool even has a kiddie pool for little ones.
3 Leisure Pools

All-ages pools—each with a whirlpool spa—are located in the Old Turtle Pond, South Point and Miller’s Road sections. Offering a more relaxing respite, these pools are perfect for Guests looking to lounge the day away.

title.text: Pools at Disney's Port Orleans Resort – French Quarter | Walt Disney World Resort

resort_join.text: Pools at Disney's Port Orleans Resort – French Quarter | Walt Disney World Resort
Pools at Disney's Port Orleans Resort – French Quarter
LocatedinDisney's Port Orleans Resort - French Quarter
Dive into Mardi Gras at Doubloon Lagoon or swim in the pool at nearby Disney’s Port Orleans Resort – Riverside.

Make a splash at Ol’ Man Island pool complex, just a short walk away at Disney’s Port Orleans Resort – Riverside. Located down the Sassagoula River, this 3.5-acre refuge includes a swimmin’ hole with rushing waterfalls and a rustic 95-foot waterslide fashioned after an old mill. A whirlpool spa, kiddie pool and even a fishin’ hole are also located on the premises.

description.text: Dive into Mardi Gras at Doubloon Lagoon or swim in the pool at nearby Disney’s Port Orleans Resort – Riverside.

availability.text: Pool lifts and other access options are available for Guests with disabilities or limited mobility. Pool hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.
Hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.

location.text: Doubloon Lagoon
Festive decorations, an all-alligator band and a blue sea serpent waterslide immerse you in the magic of New Orleans.

At Doubloon Lagoon, it’s Mardi Gras every day! Come slide down Scales, the 51-foot-long snaking sea serpent slide, whose tongue deposits you into the lagoon with a mighty splash. Alligator jazz aficionados, a water play area, a whirlpool spa and the Mardi Grogs pool bar make it even more of a party—as King Neptune watches over all of the merriment from on high.
Please note: Guests must be 48” or under to play at the Doubloon Lagoon Water Play Area.
Ol’ Man Island

title.text: Pools at Disney’s Riviera Resort | Walt Disney World Resort

resort_join.text: Pools at Disney’s Riviera Resort | Walt Disney World Resort
Bask in the fun at 2 uniquely themed pool areas at Disney’s Riviera Resort.

description.text: Bask in the fun at 2 uniquely themed pool areas at Disney’s Riviera Resort.

availability.text: Hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change. Complimentary towels are provided at both pools.

location.text: Mediterranean-Themed Pools
A family-friendly pool area invites you to play—while a more serene pool offers relaxation.

At the Riviera Pool, sun umbrellas dot the grounds as the inviting waters cast a warm, golden glow upon the surrounding stucco façades. Pure vacation bliss awaits at this family-friendly pool, which features a pool slide that winds around a stately column tower. And little mademoiselles and messieurs can make a splash at S’il Vous Play, an interactive water play area for kids that’s inspired by the grand public fountains of Europe—featuring a ballet of friendly Fantasia characters.
For a quieter afternoon, Beau Soleil Pool beckons you to unwind alongside shimmering waters in a soothing setting.
Hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change. Complimentary towels are provided at both pools.

The Paddock Pool, its aquatic play area and The Paddock Grill at Disney’s Saratoga Springs Resort will be closed from October 13, 2025 through early December for routine maintenance.

description.text: Delight your senses in 2 fantastic feature pools—plus 3 leisure pools, aqua-play areas, whirlpool spas and more.

location.text: High Rock Spring Pool
Soak up the sun at this pool with gushing waterfalls, zero-depth entry and a 128-foot-long slide built into the rocks. Then, unwind in one of 2 whirlpool spas.
Kids can frolic through bubbling jets at the Donald Duck play area and splash down the miniature waterslide.
Hungry? Grab a bite from On the Rocks Pool Bar.
The Paddock Pool

price.text: Pools at Disney's Saratoga Springs Resort & Spa | Walt Disney World Resort
Pools at Disney's Saratoga Springs Resort & Spa

amenities.text: High Rock Spring Pool
Soak up the sun at this pool with gushing waterfalls, zero-depth entry and a 128-foot-long slide built into the rocks. Then, unwind in one of 2 whirlpool spas.
Kids can frolic through bubbling jets at the Donald Duck play area and splash down the miniature waterslide.
Hungry? Grab a bite from On the Rocks Pool Bar.
The Paddock Pool

Glide down a 146-foot-long waterslide that flows from atop a water tower. And make your way out of the pool along a gently sloping, zero-depth entry point to ride it all over again. Afterward, relax in a horseshoe-shaped whirlpool spa.
Children can make a splash in the aquatic play area boasting 2 pint-sized waterslides—including a miniature curving slide.
Hungry? Grab a bite to eat from The Paddock Grill.
3 Leisure Pools

All-ages leisure pools—each with a whirlpool spa—are located at the Treehouse Villas, Congress Park and The Grandstand. The latter 2 pools also feature children’s playgrounds and barbeque grilling areas.
Poolside Activities

Let’s make a splash at High Rock Spring Pool! Join us for family-friendly activities each day, like themed pool parties and other cool activities. Fun offerings include themed pool games, relays, trivia and more! See a Recreation Host for additional details.
At all pools, hours and lifeguard availability are subject to change, complimentary towels are provided and complimentary lifejackets are available upon request.

title.text: Pools at Disney's Wilderness Lodge | Walt Disney World Resort

description.text: Surround yourself with the beauty of the American Northwest at the Copper Creek Springs Pool or Boulder Ridge Cove Pool areas.

availability.text: Hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.

location.text: Copper Creek Springs Pool

Follow the bubbling Copper Creek to discover a dazzling heated pool surrounded by nature. Here, you can zip down an exciting 67-foot waterslide built into rocks and relax in hot and cold whirlpool spas.

Children can have a blast exploring the newly added activity play area. Nearby, Geyser Point Bar & Grill offers refreshments and snacks for you to savor at a patio table or on a lounge chair by the pool.
Boulder Ridge Cove Pool

Bask in the laid-back charm of this watery oasis nestled within the Boulder Ridge Villas at Disney's Wilderness Lodge. At this location, you can soak in the whirlpool spa, enjoy a swim in the zero-depth entry pool or score a first come, first served spot at one of 6 shaded seating areas.

Check Available Days
Advance reservations are highly recommended, as availability is limited.

Reservations can be made on this page or with the My Disney Experience app up to 60 days prior to your visit. Same-day reservations and walk-ins can be made on a limited basis and are subject to availability.
There is a 1-day cancellation policy. Full price will be charged/forfeited if a Guest cancels within one day or no-shows for the reservation.
Please check in at the Riverside Levee Marina at Disney’s Port Orleans Resort – Riverside 15 minutes prior to your reservation.

offerings.title: Tennis
offerings.description: Slam your way through a game, set and match at tennis courts found at 7 Walt Disney World Resort hotels.

location.label: Disney's Saratoga Springs Resort & Spa — Two (2) clay courts located in the sports courts area; check out equipment at Community Hall or Horsing Around Rentals

availability.label: Generally 9:00 AM-10:00 PM; hours may vary

price.notes: Any Guest of a Walt Disney World Resort hotel may access the tennis courts, and equipment can be obtained using your MagicBand or a valid Resort ID. Disney Vacation Club members may check out equipment free of charge; for all other Guests, an associated fee applies.

resort_join.text: Take "advantage" of any of several illuminated courts you'll "love" playing on—whatever your skill level! Play the French way on clay courts at Disney's Saratoga Springs Resort & Spa, hit balls around on hard courts or try your hand at pickleball—available at select Resort hotels!

Disney's Contemporary Resort and Bay Lake Tower at Disney's Contemporary Resort — One (1) court adjacent to Bay Lake Tower; check out tennis and pickleball equipment at Community Hall or Boat Nook Marina
Disney's Animal Kingdom Villas - Kidani Village — Two (2) hard courts located near the shuffleboard and basketball courts; check out tennis and pickleball equipment at Community Hall
Disney's Boardwalk Inn and Villas — Two (2) courts adjacent to Community Hall; check out tennis and pickleball equipment at Community Hall
The Campsites and Cabins at Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort – Two (2) hard courts located at the Meadow Recreation Area; check out tennis and pickleball equipment at the Bike Barn
Disney's Old Key West Resort — Two (2) courts near the main pool and one (1) on Old Turtle Pond Road; check out tennis and pickleball equipment at Conch Flats Community Hall or Hank’s Rent ‘N Return
Disney's Saratoga Springs Resort & Spa — Two (2) clay courts located in the sports courts area; check out equipment at Community Hall or Horsing Around Rentals
Disney's Yacht and Beach Club Resorts — One (1) court located near Admiral Pool; check out tennis and pickleball equipment at the Disney Yacht Club Front Desk.

availability.text: Operating Hours –
Check Available Days
Advance reservations are highly recommended, as availability is limited.

Reservations can be made on this page or with the My Disney Experience app up to 60 days prior to your visit. Same-day reservations and walk-ins can be made on a limited basis and are subject to availability.
There is a 1-day cancellation policy. Full price will be charged/forfeited if a Guest cancels within one day or no-shows for the reservation.
Please check in across from the main entrance to Crockett’s Tavern near Pioneer Hall at Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort & Campground 15 minutes prior to your reservation.

price.text: $65 (tax not included)

offerings.title: Basketball Courts
offerings.description: Shoot some hoops at one of several basketball courts located throughout Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort & Campground. Basketballs are available in a designated box at each court. If the box is empty, simply call Housekeeping from a Comfort Station phone and a basketball will be delivered to the court.
